title: JIPMER Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 89 Senior Resident Posts
description: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) has announced the official notification for the recruitment of 89 Senior Resident Jobs. Candidates with MBBS, BDS, MD/ MS, DNB, and MDS can grab this chance and apply for the JIPMER Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online before the last date of ap...
